polymarket.title: Bitcoin Up or Down on July 18?

polymarket_summary.summary:
We need exactly one paragraph, start with Bullish:, Bearish:, or Mixed:. Summarize overall market sentiment. Data: Bitcoin Up or Down on July 18?: Yes 96% (vol $159,450) => high confidence it will be up. Will Bitcoin reach $70,000 in July?: Yes 15% (vol $103,333) => low confidence hitting $70k. So overall sentiment: bullish about short-term up but skeptical about reaching $70k. Could be mixed? The question: "overall market sentiment". Since one indicator strongly bullish, other weak bullish. Probably overall bullish but cautious. Start with "Bullish:" then mention numbers. Must be max 80 words. One paragraph.

Let's craft ~50 words.

"Bullish: Prediction markets show a 96% chance Bitcoin will be higher on July 18 (volume $159,450), indicating strong short‑term optimism, while only a 15% chance it will hit $70,000 in July (volume $103,333), suggesting skepticism about a major rally. Overall sentiment leans bullish but tempered by limited upside expectations."
